user.title: Strømkalkulator
user.description:
Complete overview of electricity costs: grid tariffs, government subsidies, and Norgespris comparison.

Select your grid company to get started. Tax zone is set automatically.

data_description.boligtype: Residence: Subsidy up to 5000 kWh/month, Norgespris up to 5000 kWh/month. Holiday home: No subsidy, Norgespris up to 1000 kWh/month. Holiday home (permanent residence): Same as residence (Regulation § 11).
data_description.har_norgespris: Enable if you have opted for Norgespris from your grid company. Uses fixed price (40-50 øre/kWh) instead of spot price.

sensors.title: Select sensors
sensors.description: Select the sensors the integration should use for calculating grid tariffs and subsidies.

data_description.power_sensor: Sensor showing current power consumption in watts, e.g. from HAN port, Tibber Pulse, or P1 meter.
data_description.spot_price_sensor: Sensor with current spot price in NOK/kWh. Usually 'Current price' from the Nord Pool integration.
data_description.electricity_provider_price_sensor: Total price from your electricity provider (e.g. Tibber sensor). Used to show what you actually pay. Can be added later.
data_description.export_power_sensor: Sensor showing exported power in watts (solar panels/prosumer). Used to calculate revenue from electricity sales.

pricing.title: Custom pricing
pricing.description: Select your tax zone and enter energy tariff prices in NOK/kWh (incl. taxes).

data_description.avgiftssone: Determines VAT and consumption tax. Most in Southern Norway (NO1, NO2, NO5) select 'Sør-Norge'. Northern Norway (NO3, NO4) has VAT exemption.

error.already_configured: This power sensor is already used by another Strømkalkulator instance

init.title: Strømkalkulator settings
init.description: Change grid company, sensors, or Norgespris settings.

data_description.boligtype: Residence: Subsidy up to 5000 kWh/month, Norgespris up to 5000 kWh/month. Holiday home: No subsidy, Norgespris up to 1000 kWh/month. Holiday home (permanent residence): Same as residence (Regulation § 11).
data_description.avgiftssone: Set automatically from grid company. Override only if you know you belong to a different zone.
data_description.har_norgespris: Enable if you have opted for Norgespris from your grid company. Uses fixed price (40-50 øre/kWh) instead of spot price.
data_description.kapasitet_varsel_terskel: Warn when margin to next capacity tier is below this value. Default: 2.0 kW.

confirm.title: Your grid company has merged
confirm.description: {old_name} is now part of {new_name}. The integration has been updated automatically, and consumption data and history are preserved.
